form_name: USPS Change of Address (PS Form 3575)

questions.label: Is this move permanent or temporary?
What date should mail forwarding start?
If temporary, when should forwarding end?

form_name: Form W-9, Request for Taxpayer Identification Number

questions.label: Full legal name (as shown on your income tax return)
Business name / disregarded entity name (if different)
Street address (number, street, apt or suite)
Social Security Number (SSN) — leave blank to fill by hand
Employer Identification Number (EIN) — leave blank to fill by hand

form_name: Form W-4, Employee's Withholding Certificate

questions.label: What is your first name and middle initial?
What is your home street address?
What is your city, state, and ZIP code?
Do you want to include your Social Security Number?
questions.helper: You can leave this blank and write it by hand later.

questions.label: Which filing status will you use on your federal tax return?
options: Married filing jointly or Qualifying surviving spouse

questions.label: Do you currently have more than one job?
If you are married filing jointly, does your spouse also work?
questions.helper: Choose No if this does not apply.

questions.label: Are there exactly two jobs total, with similar pay?
questions.helper: This helps DocuLyft decide whether to check the Step 2(c) box.

questions.label: How many qualifying children under age 17 will you claim?
questions.helper: DocuLyft will calculate the W-4 dollar amount for you.

questions.label: How many other dependents will you claim?
questions.helper: This can include older children or other qualifying dependents.

questions.label: Do you have other yearly income not from jobs?
questions.helper: Examples: interest, dividends, retirement income. Leave blank if none.

questions.label: Do you want to claim extra deductions beyond the standard deduction?
questions.helper: Leave blank unless you know you will itemize or use the W-4 deductions worksheet.

questions.label: Do you want extra tax withheld from each paycheck?
questions.helper: Enter the extra dollar amount per paycheck, or leave blank.

questions.label: Employer name and address
questions.helper: Optional. Your employer can complete this section.

questions.label: Employer Identification Number, if known
questions.helper: Optional. Your employer can complete this.

form_name: Form W-2, Wage and Tax Statement

questions.label: Employee's first name and initial, last name

form_name: Form 1040, U.S. Individual Income Tax Return

questions.label: Filing status
options: Married filing jointly or Qualifying surviving spouse

questions.label: Your first name and middle initial
Spouse's first name and middle initial (if MFJ)
Line 1a: Total amount from W-2 box 1
Line 5b: Pensions and annuities, taxable amount
Line 6b: Social security benefits, taxable amount
Line 10: Adjustments to income from Schedule 1
Line 19: Child tax credit / credit for other dependents
Line 25a: Federal income tax withheld from W-2
Would you like to include direct deposit info for refund?

form_name: Schedule C (Form 1040), Profit or Loss from Business

questions.label: Did you materially participate in this business?
Did you start or acquire this business in 2024?

form_name: Form 4868, Application for Automatic Extension of Time to File

questions.label: Total tax you estimate you'll owe for the year
Amount you are paying with this request

form_name: Form 1099-NEC, Nonemployee Compensation
Schedule A (Form 1040), Itemized Deductions

questions.label: Your name as shown on Form 1040
Line 1: Medical and dental expenses paid
Line 5a: State and local income taxes paid
Line 8a: Home mortgage interest on Form 1098
Line 8b: Home mortgage interest not on Form 1098
Line 11: Gifts to charity by cash or check
Line 12: Gifts to charity other than cash

form_name: Form I-9, Employment Eligibility Verification

questions.label: U.S. Social Security Number (leave blank to fill by hand)
I attest, under penalty of perjury, that I am:
options: A citizen of the United States
A noncitizen national of the United States
An alien authorized to work until a specific date

questions.label: USCIS A-Number or I-94 number (if applicable)
Expiration date of work authorization (if applicable)

form_name: Form I-130, Petition for Alien Relatives
Form I-485, Application to Register Permanent Residence

questions.label: Current immigration status (your most recent visa or status)
Basis for I-485 (eligibility category)
options: Immediate relative of U.S. citizen (spouse, child under 21, parent)
Asylee (granted asylum — Form I-94 or asylum approval notice)

questions.label: Priority date from your approved petition (if applicable)
Date your authorized stay expires or expired (from I-94 or visa)
Date of last entry into the U.S.
Place (port) of last entry into the U.S.
Immigration status at time of last entry (e.g., F-1, H-1B, B-2)
Have you EVER been in immigration court removal/deportation proceedings?
Have you EVER failed to appear at an immigration hearing?
Have you EVER been arrested, cited, charged, indicted, convicted, or placed in an alternative sentencing program?
Describe each arrest/charge/conviction — date, location, charge, sentence
Have you EVER violated the terms of your U.S. visa or immigration status?
Are you likely to become a public charge (dependent on government assistance)?

form_name: Form I-765, Application for Employment Authorization

questions.label: Eligibility category code (e.g., (c)(3)(A) for DACA, (c)(9) for pending AOS)

form_name: Form N-400, Application for Naturalization

questions.label: Other names ever used (including maiden name, nicknames)
Date you became a Lawful Permanent Resident (from green card)
Basis for applying for naturalization
options: I have been a Lawful Permanent Resident for at least 5 years
I have been a LPR for at least 3 years AND have been married to and living with the same U.S. citizen for the last 3 years
I am a qualifying U.S. military member or veteran

questions.label: Is your spouse a U.S. citizen?
How well do you speak English?
Are you 65+ years old AND have been a LPR for 20+ years? (qualifies for English/civics exemption)
Have you ever claimed to be a non-U.S. national to avoid U.S. military service?
Have you failed to file a required federal, state, or local tax return in the last 5 years?
Have you EVER been a member of or associated with any organization, association, fund, foundation, party, club, society, or similar group?
List all organizations you have been a member of
Have you EVER committed, assisted, or attempted to commit a crime for which you were NOT arrested?
Have you EVER been arrested, cited, or detained by any law enforcement officer?
Describe the arrest/crime, date, location, and outcome
If male and between 18-26 when you entered the U.S., did you register with the Selective Service?
options: Not applicable — I was over 26 when I entered the U.S.

form_name: Form I-864, Affidavit of Support

questions.label: Total household size (including yourself and immigrant)

form_name: Form DS-11, Application for a U.S. Passport

Do you have specific travel plans?

form_name: Form DS-82, U.S. Passport Renewal Application

questions.label: Social Security Number — fill by hand
Name change reason (if name changed since last passport)

form_name: Form SS-5, Application for a Social Security Card

questions.label: Mailing address (street/apt, PO Box, or rural route)
Place of birth: State or foreign country
Mother's first name at her birth
Mother's maiden name (last name before first marriage)
Have you or anyone applied for a Social Security number for this person before?

form_name: Form SSA-44, Medicare Income-Related Monthly Adjustment

questions.label: Your expected modified adjusted gross income (MAGI) this year
Spouse's expected MAGI this year (if applicable)
Tax filing status for the current year

form_name: Form CMS-40B, Application for Medicare Part B

questions.label: Date employer/union group coverage ended (if SEP)

Education or training objective (degree, program, etc.)

form_name: Form WH-380-E, FMLA Certification — Employee's Own Health Condition

questions.label: Describe the medical condition for which leave is needed
Does the patient require inpatient care (hospitalization)?
Will there be continuing treatment by a health care provider?
Estimated duration of each treatment (e.g., 1–2 hours)
Does condition require a reduced work schedule?
If reduced schedule, hours per week employee can work
Estimated duration of employee's leave (in weeks)

form_name: Form 8822, IRS Change of Address

questions.label: Your first name and middle initial
Your Social Security Number or ITIN

New address (number, street, apt, PO Box)

form_name: Form 1040-X, Amended U.S. Individual Income Tax Return

questions.label: Your name as shown on original return
Tax year of the original return being amended
Original filing status
options: Married filing jointly or Qualifying surviving spouse

questions.label: New filing status (if changing)
options: Married filing jointly or Qualifying surviving spouse

questions.label: Net change to income (positive = increase, negative = decrease)
Explanation of changes (what you are correcting and why)

form_name: Form 1040-ES, Estimated Tax for Individuals

questions.label: Estimated taxable income for the year
Estimated tax rate or total tax (from worksheet)
Required annual payment (90% of current year or 100% of prior year)

Also claiming Convention Against Torture protection?

Jobs you had in the last 15 years (job title, dates, duties)

Describe how your conditions limit your ability to work

form_name: Form CMS-L564, Request for Employment Information

questions.label: Employee's Social Security Number or Medicare number
Date employer group health plan coverage began
Date employer group health plan coverage ended

form_name: Form WH-381, FMLA Notice of Eligibility and Rights

questions.label: Is the employee eligible for FMLA leave?
Will leave be taken intermittently or on a reduced schedule?
If intermittent, estimated frequency and duration of each absence
Is the employee required to substitute paid leave?
Type of paid leave to be substituted
Date certification is due (15 calendar days)
Will a fitness-for-duty certification be required?
Will health benefits be maintained during leave?

form_name: Form WH-382, FMLA Designation Notice

questions.label: Amount of leave counted against FMLA entitlement (hours)
Is a fitness-for-duty certification required before returning?
Essential functions employee must be able to perform:

form_name: Form CMS-10114, Notice of Medicare Non-Coverage

questions.label: Name of provider/facility issuing this notice
Service or care being discontinued (describe specifically)
Last date Medicare will cover this service
Date this notice was delivered to beneficiary
Reason Medicare coverage is ending for this service
Does the beneficiary want to request a QIO (Quality Improvement Organization) expedited review?
Name of the QIO in your state (if requesting review)
Deadline to request appeal (noon the day before last covered date)

form_name: Form CMS-10182, Medicare Redetermination Request

questions.label: Claim number from the Medicare Summary Notice (MSN)
Item or service you are appealing
Name of provider or supplier who furnished the item/service
Date on the initial determination (from MSN or remittance)
Why do you disagree with this decision? Be specific.
Are you attaching additional information to support your appeal?
Date you are signing this request

form_name: Form CMS-1490S, Patient's Request for Medical Payment

questions.label: Description of services or items received
Amount you have already paid, if any
Do you have other health insurance besides Medicare?
Why didn't the provider bill Medicare directly?

form_name: Form CMS-20027, Medicare Advantage Enrollment Request

questions.label: Medicare Number (from red, white, and blue Medicare card)
Do you have Medicare Part A (Hospital Insurance)?
Do you have Medicare Part B (Medical Insurance)?
Name of Medicare Advantage plan you want to join
Plan ID or contract number (from plan materials)
Do you live in a long-term care facility?
Name of primary care doctor you want to use
Have you been diagnosed with End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD)?
Reason for enrolling now
options: Initial Coverage Election Period (new to Medicare)
Special Enrollment Period — lost other coverage
Special Enrollment Period — moved out of plan service area

form_name: Form CMS-1763, Request to Terminate Medicare Part B

questions.label: Reason for requesting termination of Part B
options: I have employer group health plan coverage
I have coverage through my spouse's employer
I have TRICARE or other military coverage
I do not want or need Part B

questions.label: Other reason for terminating Part B
I understand that if I later want Part B, I may face a late enrollment penalty and can only re-enroll during limited enrollment periods.

form_name: Form WH-384, FMLA Certification — Qualifying Exigency

Category of qualifying exigency
options: Short-notice deployment (7 days or less notice)
Rest and recuperation (up to 15 calendar days)

questions.label: Describe the specific exigency and how leave is needed
Approximate dates or schedule of leave needed

questions.label: Describe the serious injury or illness
How does the condition render the servicemember unable to care for themselves?

form_name: Form WH-385-V, FMLA Certification — Veteran Serious Injury or Illness

questions.label: Describe the serious injury or illness
VA disability rating percentage, if known
